brief: US strikes continue against Iran for a seventh night as Iran retaliates against US allies, while wildfires persist across North America and the World Cup final approaches. In research, studies on writing pedagogy and AI-assisted composition dominate, alongside technical papers on urban driving analysis and multimodal LLM visualization.
news_summary: US-Iran conflict escalates with strikes and counterstrikes, including attacks on Kuwaiti infrastructure; wildfires in the US and Canada continue to affect air quality; and the World Cup final between Argentina and Spain highlights cross-generational talent and cultural debate.
papers_summary: Research on second language writing instruction and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves are prominent, along with exploratory causal analysis of urban driving data and benchmarking multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization literacy.

en.brief: US strikes continue against Iran for a seventh night as Iran retaliates against US allies, while wildfires persist across North America and the World Cup final approaches. In research, studies on writing pedagogy and AI-assisted composition dominate, alongside technical papers on urban driving analysis and multimodal LLM visualization.
en.news_summary: US-Iran conflict escalates with strikes and counterstrikes, including attacks on Kuwaiti infrastructure; wildfires in the US and Canada continue to affect air quality; and the World Cup final between Argentina and Spain highlights cross-generational talent and cultural debate.
en.papers_summary: Research on second language writing instruction and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves are prominent, along with exploratory causal analysis of urban driving data and benchmarking multimodal LLMs for scientific visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 世界杯决赛阿根廷对阵西班牙，除了冠军之争还有5000万美元奖金；月经追踪App的隐私漏洞引发关注；梅西、马拉多纳和贝利谁是最强足球传奇引发讨论。
zh.news_summary: 世界杯决赛看点包括阿根廷与西班牙的跨世代对决、史上最高奖金，以及梅西、马拉多纳和贝利的史上最佳之争；同时，月经周期App的隐私问题被曝光。

todays_image.caption: Both the floating icebergs and the airstrikes reveal that what is visible above the surface is only a fragment of a much larger, hidden turmoil.
todays_image.title: Five Floating Icebergs, Canada
